scope: Base game + Hearts of Stone + Blood and Wine; includes collectible rows and leader cards.
deduplication_rule: For unique_cards, names ending in "(n of m)" are merged by canonical_name + deck; card_entries keeps every obtainable copy/row.

sources.name: The Witcher 3 Gwent Cards Checklist
sources.used_for: complete card entry list, deck, expansion, territory, acquisition details

leader_descriptions.name: Crach an Craite
leader_descriptions.ability_en: Shuffle all cards from each player's graveyard back into their decks.
leader_descriptions.ability_zh: 将双方弃牌堆中的所有牌洗回各自的牌组。

leader_descriptions.name: King Bran
leader_descriptions.ability_en: Units only lose half their Strength in bad weather conditions.
leader_descriptions.ability_zh: 恶劣天气下，单位牌只损失一半战力。

leader_descriptions.name: Emhyr var Emreis: Emperor of Nilfgaard
leader_descriptions.ability_en: Look at 3 random cards from your opponent's hand.
leader_descriptions.ability_zh: 随机查看对手手牌中的 3 张牌。

leader_descriptions.name: Emhyr var Emreis: His Imperial Majesty
leader_descriptions.ability_en: Pick a Torrential Rain card from your deck and play it instantly.
leader_descriptions.ability_zh: 从牌组中选择一张“暴雨”并立即打出。

leader_descriptions.name: Emhyr var Emreis: Invader of the North
leader_descriptions.ability_en: Abilities that restore a unit to the battlefield restore a randomly-chosen unit. Affects both players.
leader_descriptions.ability_zh: 复活单位的能力改为随机复活单位；双方都受影响。

leader_descriptions.name: Emhyr var Emreis: The Relentless
leader_descriptions.ability_en: Draw a card from your opponent's discard pile.
leader_descriptions.ability_zh: 从对手弃牌堆中抽取一张牌。

leader_descriptions.name: Emhyr var Emreis: The White Flame
leader_descriptions.ability_en: Cancel your opponent's Leader Ability.
leader_descriptions.ability_zh: 取消对手的领袖能力。

leader_descriptions.name: Eredin Bréacc Glas: The Treacherous
leader_descriptions.ability_en: Doubles the strength of all spy cards (affects both players).
leader_descriptions.ability_zh: 所有间谍牌战力翻倍；双方都受影响。

leader_descriptions.name: Eredin: Bringer of Death
leader_descriptions.ability_en: Restore a card from your discard pile to your hand.
leader_descriptions.ability_zh: 从自己的弃牌堆中选择一张牌回到手牌。

leader_descriptions.name: Eredin: Commander of the Red Riders
leader_descriptions.ability_en: Double the strength of all your Close Combat units unless a Commander's Horn is also present on that row.
leader_descriptions.ability_zh: 己方近战排所有单位战力翻倍；若该排已有“领导号角”则不叠加。

leader_descriptions.name: Eredin: Destroyer of Worlds
leader_descriptions.ability_en: Discard 2 cards and draw 1 card of your choice from your deck.
leader_descriptions.ability_zh: 弃掉 2 张牌，然后从牌组中选择并抽取 1 张牌。

leader_descriptions.name: Eredin: King of the Wild Hunt
leader_descriptions.ability_en: Pick any weather card from your deck and play it instantly.
leader_descriptions.ability_zh: 从牌组中选择任意一张天气牌并立即打出。

leader_descriptions.name: Foltest: King of Temeria
leader_descriptions.ability_en: Pick an Impenetrable Fog card from your deck and play it instantly.
leader_descriptions.ability_zh: 从牌组中选择一张“浓雾”并立即打出。

leader_descriptions.name: Foltest: Lord Commander of the North
leader_descriptions.ability_en: Clear any weather effects in play.
leader_descriptions.ability_zh: 清除场上所有天气效果。

leader_descriptions.name: Foltest: Son of Medell
leader_descriptions.ability_en: Destroy your enemy's strongest Ranged Combat unit(s) if the combined strength of all enemy Ranged Combat units is 10 or more.
leader_descriptions.ability_zh: 若敌方远程排总战力不低于 10，摧毁敌方远程排中战力最高的单位。

leader_descriptions.name: Foltest: The Siegemaster
leader_descriptions.ability_en: Doubles the strength of all your Siege units unless a Commander's Horn is also present on that row.
leader_descriptions.ability_zh: 己方攻城排所有单位战力翻倍；若该排已有“领导号角”则不叠加。

leader_descriptions.name: Foltest: The Steel-Forged
leader_descriptions.ability_en: Destroy your enemy's strongest Siege unit(s) if the combined strength of all enemy Siege units is 10 or more.
leader_descriptions.ability_zh: 若敌方攻城排总战力不低于 10，摧毁敌方攻城排中战力最高的单位。

leader_descriptions.name: Francesca Findabair: Daisy of the Valley
leader_descriptions.ability_en: Draw an extra card at the beginning of the battle.
leader_descriptions.ability_zh: 战斗开始时额外抽 1 张牌。

leader_descriptions.name: Francesca Findabair: Hope of the Aen Seidhe
leader_descriptions.ability_en: Move agile units to whichever valid row maximizes their strength; do not move units already in the optimal row.
leader_descriptions.ability_zh: 将敏捷单位移动到能使其战力最大化的有效排；已在最优排的单位不移动。

leader_descriptions.name: Francesca Findabair: Pureblood Elf
leader_descriptions.ability_en: Pick a Biting Frost card from your deck and play it instantly.
leader_descriptions.ability_zh: 从牌组中选择一张“霜霰”并立即打出。

leader_descriptions.name: Francesca Findabair: Queen of Dol Blathanna
leader_descriptions.ability_en: Destroy your enemy's strongest Close Combat unit(s) if the combined strength of all enemy Close Combat units is 10 or more.
leader_descriptions.ability_zh: 若敌方近战排总战力不低于 10，摧毁敌方近战排中战力最高的单位。

leader_descriptions.name: Francesca Findabair: The Beautiful
leader_descriptions.ability_en: Doubles the strength of all your Ranged Combat units unless a Commander's Horn is also present on that row.
leader_descriptions.ability_zh: 己方远程排所有单位战力翻倍；若该排已有“领导号角”则不叠加。

card_entries.name: Ballista (2 of 2)
card_entries.acquisition_details: Included at start of game (bug: sometimes you start with just one)

card_entries.name: Black Infantry Archer (1 of 2)
card_entries.acquisition_details: Claywich Village, Trader (first rescue at persons in distress marker on the large island to the east of Oreton)

card_entries.name: Blue Stripes Commando (3 of 3)
card_entries.acquisition_details: White Orchard Tavern, Innkeeperess (or Trader outside)

card_entries.name: Botchling
card_entries.acquisition_details: Ard Skellig, Kaer Trolde Harbor, New Port Inn, Innkeeper

card_entries.name: Catapult (1 of 2)
card_entries.acquisition_details: White Orchard Tavern, Innkeeperess (or Trader outside)

card_entries.name: Cirilla Fiona Elen Riannon
card_entries.acquisition_details: Gwent: Big City Players, Novigrad Forest Camp, Scoia'Tael merchant

card_entries.name: Clear Weather (2 of 3)
card_entries.acquisition_details: Included at start of game OR Randomly earned

card_entries.name: Clear Weather (3 of 3)
card_entries.acquisition_details: Included at start of game OR Randomly earned

card_entries.name: Commander's Horn (1 of 3)
card_entries.acquisition_details: Inn at the Crossroads, Innkeeper (can appear a 2nd time after inventory refresh)

card_entries.name: Commander's Horn (2 of 3)
card_entries.acquisition_details: Passiflora, Marquise Serenity (note: card could be missing)

card_entries.name: Crinfrid Reavers Dragon Hunter (1 of 3)
card_entries.acquisition_details: White Orchard Tavern, Innkeeperess (or Trader outside)

card_entries.name: Crinfrid Reavers Dragon Hunter (2 of 3)
card_entries.acquisition_details: Claywich Village, Trader (first rescue at persons in distress marker on the large island to the east of Oreton)

card_entries.name: Crone: Weavess
card_entries.acquisition_details: Gwent: Velen Players, Benek, Old Sage

card_entries.name: Dandelion
card_entries.acquisition_details: A Matter of Life and Death, Vegelbud Estate, Marius Florin (final round)

card_entries.name: Decoy (1 of 3)
card_entries.acquisition_details: White Orchard Tavern, Innkeeperess (or Trader outside after prologue)

card_entries.name: Decoy (2 of 3)
card_entries.acquisition_details: Crow's Perch, Quartermaster's Baron's Store (can appear a 2nd time after inventory refresh)

card_entries.name: Decoy (3 of 3)
card_entries.acquisition_details: Seven Cats Inn, Innkeeper (note: card could be missing)

card_entries.name: Draug
card_entries.acquisition_details: Gwent: Skellige Style, Ard Skellig, Kaer Trolde, Crach an Craite OR automatically received (if not played before On Thin Ice starts)

card_entries.name: Dwarven Skirmisher (3 of 3)
card_entries.acquisition_details: Oxenfurt, The Alchemy Inn, Stjepan OR Randomly earned

card_entries.name: Earth Elemental
card_entries.acquisition_details: Ard Skellig, Kaer Trolde Harbor, New Port Inn, Innkeeper

card_entries.name: Eithné
card_entries.acquisition_details: Gwent: Old Pals, Rosemary and Thyme, Zoltan

card_entries.acquisition_details: Gwent: Old Pals OR Gwent: Play Thaler, The Seven Cats Inn, Thaler OR Seven Cats Inn, top of a crate at the end of the side dining hall (no objective, use witcher senses)

card_entries.name: Isengrim Faoiltiarna
card_entries.acquisition_details: A Dangerous Game, Zed's home OR Prison Warden body during The Great Escape

card_entries.name: John Natalis
card_entries.acquisition_details: A Dangerous Game, Golden Sturgeon Tavern, Ravvy OR Prison Warden body during The Great Escape
